3093450.name: Backspace Backspace Backspace Soundtrack
3093450.description:
BACKSPACE BACKSPACE BACKSPACE Original Soundtrack by Blue Tango Street

This chiptune album was made to complement Backspace Backspace Backspace's pixel art style and embody the despair, joy, and struggle of the creative experience. This is also our first time making music without commissioning it or using free assets. Our favorite track is First Draft, First Me.

If you don't want to or can't buy the soundtrack, you can still listen to it on YouTube for free.

If you liked our game and would like to support us further, please consider leaving a review, telling your friends about it, and/or buying this soundtrack. It helps our studio grow and it'll mean a lot to us.

This original soundtrack was made by Quillcannon using Beepbox.
